title: Gooey Chinese All Purpose Flour Crumble
description: A fresh, gooey, cozy Cantonese dish featuring all purpose flour that is perfectly grillable and suitable for a paleo-friendly diet.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the All-Purpose Flour, Coconut Oil, Vanilla Extract, and Caster Sugar. Mix until well combined and a crumbly dough forms.
Add in eggs one at a time, mixing gently after each addition to ensure the mixture is not too wet.
Divide the dough into small balls (about 1 inch diameter) and roll them between your hands to form a crisp outer layer and a gooey center. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet.
Lightly dust with Almond Flour to prevent sticking, then press lightly with your fingers if needed.
Grill for about 2-3 minutes per side or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Remove from grill and allow to cool slightly before serving. Garnish with Coconut Nibs if desired.
